title: Add a Tote Back to the System Using a Station ID
summary: Use the tote management API function to add a specified tote back into the system and associate it with a destination station ID. The source states that the station ID can be identified in RMS by selecting the relevant cell, and that the tote management page includes an Add Tote function.
when_to_use: Use when a tote needs to be re-added or placed back into the system and the intended destination station must be specified by station ID.
not_for: Do not use when the correct station ID cannot be confirmed in RMS.
Do not use as a substitute for procedures requiring exact field names, exact UI sequence, or explicit success indicators, because those details are not provided in this source.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Identify the tote, confirm the destination station ID in RMS, use the tote management Add Tote function, and verify the tote is associated with the intended station.

safety_notes: This action changes live tote state in the system.
Use the correct station ID before submitting the add action.
Escalate if the correct station ID cannot be confirmed in RMS.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to tote management interface or API-backed tote add function
RMS access to view station IDs
Tote identifier and target station ID

access_required: Access to the tote management interface or API-backed Add Tote function
system_preconditions: The tote to be added is identified.
The destination station ID is known or can be confirmed in RMS.

visual_references.description: Training slide showing the tote management API features, including Add Tote.

steps.title: Identify the tote to add back
steps.purpose: Ensure the correct tote is selected before making a live system change.
steps.instruction: Identify the tote that needs to be added back into the system.
steps.expected_result: A specific tote has been identified for the add action.
steps.healthy_condition: The tote identifier is known and ready to be entered into the tote management function.
steps.failure_condition: The tote to be added cannot be clearly identified.

actions.label: Identify tote
actions.exact_action: Identify the tote that needs to be added back into the system.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and escalate if the tote cannot be clearly identified.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR: Add Tote — Adds a specified tote to the system.

steps.title: Confirm the destination station ID in RMS
steps.purpose: Ensure the tote is added to the intended destination station.
steps.instruction: Determine the correct station ID for that tote by checking RMS and selecting the relevant cell to view the station ID.
steps.expected_result: The correct station ID is confirmed for the tote destination.
steps.healthy_condition: RMS shows the station ID for the selected cell and the destination station ID is known.
steps.failure_condition: The station ID cannot be confirmed or the selected cell does not provide a usable station ID.

actions.label: Check RMS cell
actions.exact_action: In RMS, select the relevant cell to view the station ID.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the correct station ID cannot be confirmed in RMS.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: In RMS, when you pick a cell, you could see the station ID.
Station ID is described as the reference used when adding or reassigning a tote, and the training says the station ID can be viewed in RMS when selecting a cell.

steps.title: Open the Add Tote function
steps.purpose: Access the tote management function used to add the tote back into the system.
steps.instruction: Open the tote management function that allows a tote to be added to the system.
steps.expected_result: The Add Tote function is available for data entry.
steps.healthy_condition: The tote management interface shows the Add Tote function.
steps.failure_condition: The Add Tote function is not available or cannot be accessed.

actions.label: Open Add Tote
actions.exact_action: Open the tote management function that allows a tote to be added to the system.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The API Features for Tote Management list showing Add Tote among the available functions.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and escalate if the Add Tote function cannot be located or accessed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR: Add Tote — Adds a specified tote to the system.
Visible functions include Add Tote, Remove Tote, Get Tote Task, Resend Tote Task, Exchange Tote, Exchange Lane, and Get Exchange Settings.
Aveva API page lists API Features for Tote Management: Add Tote, Remove Tote, Get Tote Task, Resend Tote Task, Exchange Tote, Exchange Lane, and Get Exchange Settings.

steps.title: Enter tote information and station ID
steps.purpose: Provide the required tote and destination information for the add action.
steps.instruction: Enter the tote information and specify the station ID for the destination station.
steps.expected_result: The tote information and destination station ID are entered into the add function.
steps.healthy_condition: The intended tote and confirmed station ID are entered and ready for submission.
steps.failure_condition: Required information cannot be entered correctly or the station ID is uncertain.

actions.label: Enter tote and station
actions.exact_action: Enter the tote information and specify the station ID for the destination station.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The tote management API page context showing Add Tote as the function used for this action.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the correct station ID cannot be confirmed.
Stop and escalate if the source-provided interface does not make the required entry fields clear.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: You can specify what station ID it is.
OCR: Add Tote — Adds a specified tote to the system.

steps.title: Submit and verify tote association
steps.purpose: Confirm that the tote was successfully added and associated with the intended station.
steps.instruction: Submit the add action and verify in the available interface that the tote is now associated with the intended station.
steps.expected_result: The specified tote is added to the system and associated with the intended station ID.
steps.healthy_condition: The tote appears associated with the intended station after submission.
steps.failure_condition: The tote cannot be added or does not appear at the intended station after submission.

actions.label: Verify station association
actions.exact_action: Verify in the available interface that the tote is now associated with the intended station.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the tote cannot be added.
Escalate if the tote does not appear at the intended station after submission.
Escalate if the interface does not provide a clear success indicator.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR: Add Tote — Adds a specified tote to the system.
You can specify what station ID it is.

success_criteria: The specified tote is added to the system.
The tote is associated with the intended station ID.
The association can be verified in an available interface.
healthy_conditions: The correct station ID can be confirmed in RMS.
The Add Tote function is available in the tote management interface.
The tote appears associated with the intended station after submission.
failure_conditions: The correct station ID cannot be confirmed in RMS.
The Add Tote function cannot be accessed.
The tote does not appear at the intended station after submission.
The source does not provide exact field names or explicit success indicators.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the correct station ID cannot be confirmed in RMS.
Escalate if the tote cannot be added or does not appear at the intended station after submission.
Escalate if the interface does not provide enough detail to determine the correct fields or success state.
